hero.title: Tulipes Et Cetera
hero.subtitle: Your haven of peace in Alsace
hero.slide1: A haven of serenity at the end of a quiet lane, where time stands still
hero.slide2: Three charming rooms, premium bedding and a spa bath
hero.slide3: Homemade breakfast, kougelhopf and local organic produce
hero.slide4: You will arrive as a guest and leave as a friend

home.cta_title: Ready for a getaway in Alsace?
home.cta_subtitle: Book your stay now and enjoy our charming house.
home.testimonial1_text: Reality exceeds all expectations. An indefinable something that makes you feel truly at home.
home.testimonial2_text: Magnificent place, exceptional bedding, top-notch welcome! We will definitely come back.

maison.page_subtitle: An unusual charming house, open to a lush green setting
maison.section_title: They call me a "Charming House" — and I am!
maison.desc1: Unusual and open to a lush green setting, I offer all my assets: independence, peace, comfort, relaxation and all the elements that will contribute to the happiness of those who reside under my roof. A well-kept private garden, parking spaces, free bike rental, an electric car charger and at the back of the property a fire pit for atmosphere.
maison.desc2: Let me tell you about myself, the Charming House… I have a large living/dining room with a library of books and magazines, a smart TV and all sorts of leisure equipment. A front step and a large terrace, a wood stove, a fully equipped kitchen, a washing machine, a separate toilet, an office… all on the ground floor.
maison.desc3: Upstairs are three bedrooms, a bathroom with shower and spa bath, etc. The beds are generously sized and the bedding is of high quality — everything is provided.

chambres.page_subtitle: Three charming rooms for an unforgettable stay in Alsace
chambres.cta_text: All rooms feature quality bedding, linen provided, and access to the bathroom with spa bath.
chambres.tulipe_desc: The main bedroom, bright and spacious. King-size double bed with a direct view of the flower garden. Elegant decor with floral touches.
chambres.lavande_desc: A cosy and soothing room, ideal for a romantic stay. Comfortable double bed with a reading nook set up by the window.
chambres.cigogne_desc: The family room, spacious and welcoming. Double bed with the option to add a child's bed. Ideal for families.

services.page_subtitle: Everything you need for a perfect stay, included or available on site
services.breakfast_desc: Homemade kougelhopf, fresh bread, farm eggs, artisan jams and local Alsatian products. A gentle start to every morning.
services.wifi_desc: Smart TV, library with books and magazines, board games, bed and bath linen provided — all the comforts of home.
services.bikes_desc: Bike rental to explore the Sundgau at your own pace: picturesque villages, vineyards, ponds and marked cycle paths.
services.pony_desc: Meet the property's pony! A delight for children and a gentle moment for adults.
services.picnic_desc: On request, we prepare picnic baskets with organic and local products for your outings in the region.
services.brasero_desc: Private garden of 3,000 m², landscaped terrace and fire pit for summer evenings. Your green space, all to yourself.

decouvrir.page_subtitle: Sundgau, Alsatian gastronomy and activities — your travel guide from Waldighoffen
decouvrir.cta_title: Waldighoffen — in the heart of the Sundgau
decouvrir.cta_distances: 20 min from Basel · 30 min from Mulhouse · 45 min from ski slopes 🌷
decouvrir.sundgau_desc: Nicknamed "the little Tuscany of Alsace", the Sundgau is a region of rolling green hills, flower-filled villages and shimmering ponds. Just a stone's throw from the house, Ferrette — a perched medieval town — offers breathtaking views over the valley. Discover villages like Oltingue, Leymen or Fislis, each with its church, wash house and flower-lined lanes.
decouvrir.gastro_desc: Alsace is a land of flavours. The fried carp of the Sundgau is a must-try in the many restaurants of the region. Sauerkraut, baeckeoffe, munster, Alsatian wines and kougelhopf all await you. Local markets are bursting with fresh and artisan products.
decouvrir.activities_desc: The region offers a dense network of cycling paths and hiking trails. Explore the Southern Vosges Nature Park, the vineyards of the Wine Route, or Basel just 20 minutes away. In winter, the Vosges ski resorts are accessible in less than an hour.

livret.eq1: Equipped kitchen: hobs, oven, microwave, fridge, coffee maker
livret.eq3: Smart TV (Netflix, YouTube…) — remote on the unit
livret.eq4: Wood stove — logs available in the cellar
livret.eq5: Spa bath — instructions displayed in the bathroom
livret.eq6: Bikes available in the garage — helmets included
livret.eq7: Electric car charger — type 2 socket on the garden side
livret.waste_green_desc: Glass (bins in front of the gate)
livret.waste_collection: Collection: Tuesday morning — bins out the evening before
livret.r1: À la Carpe Frite — Sierentz (speciality fried carp, 10 min)
livret.r2: Auberge du Sundgau — Ferrette (traditional Alsatian cuisine, 15 min)
livret.r3: Restaurant de la Couronne — Altkirch (brasserie, 12 min)
livret.a1: Ferrette & castle — medieval village (15 min by bike)
livret.a2: Landskron Animal Park — Huningue (25 min by car)
livret.a3: Basel (Switzerland) — museums, shopping, old town (20 min by car)
livret.a4: Sundgau Pond Trail — starting 500m from the house
livret.a5: Alsatian Wine Route — Guebwiller (30 min by car)
